laws.title: Public Law 24-178 | Equality in Employment Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: Chronology ties the substantive amendment to 42 U.S.C. 2000e-2(a); the branch has the Title 42 rewrite, while the older misanchored note remains parked elsewhere.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_amendment_command: Add gender identity and sexual orientation to the protected characteristics in subsection (a)(1) and (a)(2).

laws.current_xml_comparison: The actual Title 42 amendment is present in the current branch but absent from origin/main; both trees still carry the misanchored note at /us/usc/t29/s201.
laws.final_recommended_action: Keep the Title 42 amendment and move or replace the note at the correct Title 42 anchor.

laws.title: Public Law 30-224 | Vacancies and Acting Officer Reform Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: Chronology ties this to the acting-officer subchapter and section 3345 rewrite, but the branch still only carries a note at section 101.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_amendment_command: Repeal 5 U.S. Code subchapter III in its entirety except for sections 3341-3344, and rewrite 5 U.S.C. 3345 to make the first assistant, then the President's designated officer or employee, serve temporarily subject to the Act's limits.
source_evidence: codification/mass_migration/latest/reports/laws/PL-030-224.md identifies both the subchapter repeal and the 5 U.S.C. 3345 rewrite.
audit/chronology-report.json ties the law to /us/usc/t5/s3345.
usc/usc05.xml shows only the note in both current branch and origin/main.
laws.current_xml_comparison: Both trees carry the note at /us/usc/t5/s101, but the actual subchapter repeal and 5 U.S.C. 3345 rewrite are not applied.
laws.final_recommended_action: Apply the acting-officer rewrite and keep only a concise note for the timing language.
